creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks Graham.

I don't think the lines should be wrapped in the rendered version of the report, but they should be in the mail version and I have already been reported that they are not.

Changing the bugged lines to nested bullet points might fix the issue indeed, but I think the author's intention was to provide a list of small paragraphs with titles, without nesting bullet points.

Maybe we could change the existing bullet points into headers and write normal paragraphs under it. Does it sound good?
